SessionStart.command: uv run python -m mcp_agent_mail.cli file_reservations active mcp_agent_mail
uv run python -m mcp_agent_mail.cli acks pending mcp_agent_mail leegonzales --limit 20

hooks.command: uv run python -m mcp_agent_mail.cli file_reservations soon mcp_agent_mail --minutes 10
uv run python -m mcp_agent_mail.cli list-acks --project mcp_agent_mail --agent leegonzales --limit 10
uv run python -m mcp_agent_mail.cli file_reservations list mcp_agent_mail
